raw_consumer_statement: I opened up a credit card with Citi Bank. I used the card one time for a purchase of {$250.00} at my XXXX  office. I only used the card one time. Once I received the statement balance, the balance showed approx. {$430.00} in additional purchases that I did not authorize. I've disputed this with Citi Bank 3 times and they refuse to remove the charges.
